message:
test(evidence+decoding+tls): add 44 unit tests across evidence_sink, decoding, and TLS modules

B10 bead (asupersync-3narc.2.10) — evidence/decoding/TLS invariant unit closure:
- evidence_sink.rs: 13 new tests covering emit_scheduler_evidence (fields,
  fallback, all-zero depths), emit_cancel_evidence, emit_budget_evidence
  (with/without deadline), CollectorSink default/debug, NullSink clone/copy/debug,
  JsonlSink path/debug/append-multiple
- decoding.rs: 24 new tests covering DecodingError Display all variants,
  DecodingError->Error conversion (ErrorKind mapping for all 6 variants),
  RejectReason equality/debug, SymbolAcceptResult equality/ne, DecodingConfig
  defaults, BlockStateKind eq/debug, DecodingPipeline construction/progress,
  set_object_params rejection (size mismatch, inconsistent object_id, same-id ok)
- tls/error.rs: 8 new tests covering Display for handshake/certificate/
  certificate_not_yet_valid/chain_validation/configuration/alpn-no-negotiated,
  source() returns None for all non-Io variants, From<io::Error>; also fixes
  pre-existing test_display_alpn_negotiation_failed (byte vec Debug output
  doesn't contain UTF-8 string "http/1.1")
- tls/stream.rs: 4 new tests covering TlsState self-equality, exhaustive
  pairwise inequality, debug output all variants, clone-and-copy semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
